news.paragraph: Workday recently announced the launch of an AI-focused accelerator program in partnership with Anthropic and LISC. Despite this new initiative, the stock has recently experienced a price dip while the broader market has trended higher. Options traders should monitor this recent price weakness relative to the company's ongoing AI-related developments.
headlines: Workday, Anthropic, and Local Initiatives Support Corporation (LISC) Launch AI-Focused Solopreneurship Accelerator Program
